meaning: adj.勤学的,认真的,慎重的,热心的
examples: I was a very quiet, studious little girl.
Perhaps they're working hard—they don't appear to be very studious here, but they are very friendly.
She is quiet and studious, in marked contrast to her sister.
With him are a studious but sultry librarian (Rachel Weisz) and her dim but cowardly brother (John Hannah).
By Masai standards, Mr Kinyago's is a studious family: only 35% of the children of Kenyan pastoralists attend classes.
